deployment_package.output:
LocustHub deployment package ready
- docker-compose.yml includes mysql and one api service that serves the admin console
- backend/Dockerfile builds the Vue admin console and copies it into the FastAPI image
- deploy/helm/locusthub defaults to integrated admin serving with optional split admin workloads
- deploy/helm/locusthub includes ingress, TLS, and Secret-backed settings
- .env.example documents required local, OSS, and Kubernetes runtime keys
